programme.title: Boys of H Company

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo get jammed up in STUCK MY LIFE, take their chances in GATOR GAMBLIN' and enlist in the GRAVY SEALS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Young M.A joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about people who have HOT SAUCE, the meaning of RED LYFE, and the joy of CASH BATHS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, things get grosser than ever when Rob, Chanel, and Steelo check out some talented ASS MASTERS, avoid the BOOGIE KNIGHTS and discover the disgusting side of MOTHER BIRDING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, reality star Tami Roman joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about her extreme case of RATNAPHOBIA, what it means to be STREET DUMB, and about living with BUTT REGRET.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new remix episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo swap places as Chanel teaches that CUTE KILLS, Steelo warns about DEATH CARTS and Rob shows how people get down with PPP

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate summer vacation by getting SAND BLASTED, take a trip to PAINLAND and party with THE BANG GANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, radio and TV star Charlemagne Tha God joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to PUT SOME RESPECK ON MY NAME, call out the DONKEYS OF THE DAY and realize some people are just DILDO DUMB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by none other than Rob's dad, Gene Dyrdek who teaches the gang about THE POWER OF MAGNETS, that it's NEVER TOO LATE and the mysterious GREY GUNNERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Big Baby D.R.A.M. joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get into some BAD BROCCOLI, learn how to speak UNCLISH and fend off a few URBAN PREDATORS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Post Malone joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to ball with some REALLY WHITE IVERSONS, get messy with the category SAUCIN' ON YOU and show off some KNUCKLE TATS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On a special episode of Major Key-diculousness, DJ Khaled teaches Rob, Chanel and Sterling how to be GRATEFUL, how to avoid THEY and how to get LOST AT SKI.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On a very special awards show episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel give out Ridicky Awards such as "THE BIGGEST DICK", "THE FREEDOM FALCON" and "THE GRAND SLAM" to the stars of some of the greatest clips from the last 10 seasons.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness rapper 21 Savage joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to go into SAVAGE MODE, update the dictionary with WORD BIRTHERS and prove you never know when a random object ISSA WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo witness WORLD WAR BEE, diagnose a medical condition known as BACKFLIP BLOCK, and avoid stray tires in THE WHEEL WORLD.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop and R&B singer Ty Dolla $ign joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to check out some SIDE SHOWS, do a little NECK PREP, and find the hottest PORTA-PARTIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop producer and hit maker DJ Mustard joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to put MUSTARD ON EVERYTHING, suffer through a COLD SUMMER, and celebrate the greatest HEY MAKERS of all time.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend some BRO BURIALS, hang with a crew of LIL' TRUNKIES and teach us a new trend called SPEED BUMPING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, it's all about the kids! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the next generation by drinking some GO GO JUICE, getting caught up in TINY TORNADOS, and joining TYKE CLUB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by rapper G-Eazy to learn the DANGERS OF ALONE TIME, get a taste of the riches in THE ALMOST GOOD LIFE, and experience the heartbreak of being SERVED A CURVE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Stranger Things actor Gaten Matarazzo joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for a terrifying special episode as they witness PURE TERROR, get a TASTE OF THE GRAVE and try to avoid the DEMOGORGONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get to the bottom of fake news with VIDEO OR DIDN'T HAPPEN, describe the joy that is a CROWDGASM, and see what happens when you take too much melatonin and go MELATONIC.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the greatest form of precipitation, Rob, Steelo and Chanel pay a visit to the CUL-DE-SLOPES, watch some ICE CARPADES, and find evidence of the elusive SNOW SCORPIONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Mark Cuban joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss future investments in the MARK TANK, try to solve the CUBAN BATHROOM CRISIS and explore the DANGERS OF DUNKING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness it's Ladies Night! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate incredible women with SUPER SHE-ROES, pay homage to mothers in MOMMIN' AIN'T EASY, and explore the fabled women's restroom in LEGENDS OF THE STALL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, dedicated to the smart people who make our world a better place, Rob, Steelo and Chanel take a look at some lesser-known NERDACHIEVEMENTS, the dark side of science, with TRIAL AND TERROR

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel get dodge ball damaged in RUBBER STAMPED, become masters of disguise with BLENDERS, and get too honest dropping TRUTH BOMBS

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness singer/songwriter/producer Mike Posner joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to take TOO MANY PILLS, explore some BROMANTIC BONDS and learn about WHITE GIRL PROBLEMS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to throw down some JAMMIES, check out the TONGUE CAM and experience some water pain in the category GETTIN' LAKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness dedicated to the world of weed, Rob, Steelo and Chanel check out some ANIMALS IN PANTS, explore what it's like to have BONG BRAIN and ask themselves the question AM I HIGH?

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness the 80's are back with Rockdiculousness! Steel Panther joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to fire up the FLAME FUEL, grab some COMMUNITY PROPERTY and tempt death with LIVIN' ON A PRAYER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, we celebrate the world of NASCAR, with a salute to PASS MASTERS, an introduction to NASCAR EXITS, and a look at what happens when people get PAVEMENTAL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some PARANORM-ISH ACTIVITY, do some ATTEMPTED MAN SHIT and meet some animals that are MILK READY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Laugh along with Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they break down hilarious Redneck Good Times, Nutflix, and Double Whammies. Guest Ryan O'Malley, a professional pogo sticker, shows the highs and lows of being Pogo Stuck.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Movie Star Johnny Knoxville helps Rob break down Makeshift Ramps, Freak Beasts, and Poorly Placed Kids. Learn why you're Never too Old to Slam and why birds are not your friend.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob's former co-star Big Black joins the panel, breaking down Makeshift Thrill Rides, Bieber Hair, and Coming in Hot. See how human scorpions sting in a whole different way than the spider that attacks an innocent dad.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Goin' South
programme.desc: Gjengen skal til Miami! Mike, Pauly D, Snooki og JWoww kjører, mens de andre tar fly. Tidligere deltaker Angelina skaper drama. Ronnie og Sammi er blitt single, men det er fortsatt komplisert.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Hangover
programme.desc: Sammi vil vite hva Ronnie gjorde på klubben kvelden før, men ingen vil si det. Angelina avbryter Paulys spill, og den vanligvis så rolige Pauly D viser en helt ny side.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Creepin'
programme.desc: Angelina ber jentene om unnskyldning. Mike, Vinny og Pauly leker med granater i boblebadet, og Ron fortsatt har hemmeligheter for Sammi.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Breaking Up
programme.desc: Sammi og Ronnie har problemer, og Sammi prøver å slå opp, men tar Ronnie tilbake etter 5 minutter. Jentene legger en plan for å fortelle Sammi sannheten om kjæresten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Letter
programme.desc: Sammi finner det 'anonyme' brevet fra Snooki og Jenni, og nå er det virkelig slutt - i hvert fall en stund. Mike, Vinny og Pauly har hendene fulle med fire jenter på én kveld.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Not So Shore
programme.desc: Det anonyme brevet skaper spenning mellom jentene, og det ender i slåsskamp. Etter enda en natt med Vinny avslører Snooki en ikke så lite kjent 'hemmelighet'.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Sleeping with the Enemy
programme.desc: Gjengen må takle konsekvensene av jentenes krangel. Angelina dater Jose fra klubben, og Jenni og Snooki kler seg i hjemmelagde beskyttelsesdrakter for å rydde opp før Snookis date.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike truer med å fortelle Jose om Angelina og Vinny. Vinnys familie kommer på besøk. Og Vinny og Pauly finner drømmejentene, men en vil få knust hjertet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Dirty Pad
programme.desc: Angelina er i trøbbel når gjengen får vite at hun lå med Jose etter en natt med Vin. Men den siste dråpen kommer når Mike oppdager flere ubehageligheter på badet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Gone, Baby, Gone
programme.desc: Mike gjenforens med sin kanadiske skjønnhet, til stor underholdning for hele huset. Angelina forteller gjengen hva hun syns om dem, noe som gjør Snooki rasende og får begeret til å flyte over.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Girls Like That
programme.desc: Vinny velger mellom to grupper jenter. Siden Angelina er borte vil Snooki at hun og Jenni skal skvære opp med Sam. Gleden blir kortvarig for Snooki, når Mike blir stadig mer fiendtlig.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Deja Vu All Over Again
programme.desc: Alle er frustrerte over Mike - han får gjengen sparket ut av en klubben, får bilen tauet vekk, brenner nesten ned huset og svikter Pauly. To ganger.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back into the Fold
programme.desc: Pauly og Vin har sine siste dater med Miami-jentene, mens Sam og Ron raskt havner i krangel. Jenni lager bråk mellom Pauly og Mike, og det blir en siste kveld full av drama i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Back to the Shore
programme.desc: Gjengen er tilbake for enda en vill sommer på Jersey-kysten! Angelina er borte, og Snooki har med seg vennen Deena. Spenningen mellom jentene etter Miami eksploderer den første kvelden.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer
programme.desc: Konflikten mellom Sammi og JWoww skaper spenning i huset. Ronnie og Sammi isolerer seg og går glipp av første familiemiddag. Men når Ronnie bestemmer seg for å henge med resten av gjengen, føler Sammi seg helt alene.
programme.sub-title: It's Gonna Be an Interesting Summer

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Where's the Beach
programme.desc: Sammi vil slutte fred med Snooki og Deena. JWoww møter eksen Roger. Snooki blir arrestert for drikking på offentlig sted.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Free Snooki
programme.desc: Snooki er deprimert etter å ha blitt arrestert, helt til hun treffer en ny gutt. Deena treffer Ronnies stuntmann. JWoww og Tom slår opp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Drunk Punch Love
programme.desc: Ronnie og JWoww slutter fred, og Sammi slår til Ronnie. Vinny møter en jente med overlegen familie. Og Mike avslører Deenas lille hemmelighet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Should We Just Break Up?
programme.desc: Ronnies drikking gir smertefulle bivirkninger. Snooki treffer en gutt som kanskje eller kanskje ikke er forlovet. Pauly slutter fred med en gammel fiende.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Cabs Are Here!
programme.desc: Ronnie og Sammis stormfulle forhold er over. Ronnie ødelegger alt Sammi eier, og hun må bestemme seg for om hun skal forlate gjengen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Great Depression
programme.desc: Ronnie sliter etter at Sammi dro, og føler at han ikke har noen venner i huset. Jentene tar Sammis parti, guttene vet ikke hvordan de skal muntre ham opp. Mike legger an på Paulys ekskjæreste.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Kissing Cousins
programme.desc: Snookis sexfylte sommer hjemsøker henne. Mike drar den ultimate spøk mot Deena og Snooki, men de andre ler sist når Mike somler med å komme til middag.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog helps Leland get to the truth in a very confusing case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a man who has fled to Texas so Dog tries a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has issues with the shirt that Beth purchased for him; the gang goes after a fugitive who failed to appear in court.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the Chapman clan track a 19-year-old fugitive charged with kidnapping and menacing, then find themselves in a confrontation with their quarry's family.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tries to convince a fugitive's on-again, off-again girlfriend that it's in everyone's best interest to send the man to jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A phone call from an informant sends the team on a race against time to apprehend an elusive car thief.

programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team face many surprises while in Colorado; while the children attend camp, the crew hunts a man who disposed of a homicide victim.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his posse track a first-time offender whose life is at a crossroads.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog searches for the perfect gift for Cecily's 16th birthday and hunts a fugitive with a connection to his estranged son Tucker.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog encounters fighting roosters, hostile squatters and more odd characters while on the hunt for an elusive and clever criminal that takes Dog through the parts of Hawaii that tourists never see.

programme.title: Happy Harvest
programme.desc: Can you imagine Masha as a magical fairy? What magic could she create? Of course something enchanting and fantastic! Especially when the Bear decided to cheer the Female Bear and organize a masquerade ball! Masha put all her efforts to create a bright, memorable and very harvest party, but this magic evening couldn't survive without Masha's tricks…

programme.title: The Foundling
programme.desc: Occasionally Masha finds an egg, from which a penguin hatches. The Bear has to take double care now. He cooks special dishes and builds mini aqua park for little penguin and Masha. Finally the Bear figures out that the penguin will be happy only in suitable weather conditions and send the penguin Antarctica on a little plane.

programme.title: Get Well Soon!
programme.desc: Tired from Masha's endless games, the Bear pre-tends to be sick so the little girl would leave him alone. But the caring girl sets to cure her friend. After a series of failed attempts, she finally man-ages to cure the Bear.

programme.title: Swept Away
programme.desc: Masha and the Hare are having an epic game of hockey. When the game is at its peak, Masha goes off to find the missing puck and stumbles upon a broom. Now this is much better than a hockey stick and Masha gets an idea. But it turns out the broom can be used for things other than hockey.

programme.title: Driving Lessons
programme.desc: Who wants to pimp a car? Then hurry up to stand in a queue! Why? Because in a new, 55th episode there are loads of unexpected things that happened in the forest: Masha appears as a first-rate mechanic , wolves who, obviously, decided to change their occupation appear as taxi drivers ... okay, okay… we should stop throwing spoilers around…watch everything yourself!

programme.title: Masha Knows Best
programme.desc: Masha is sure that she is the best nanny in the world because all children simply adore her! Could this actually be true?

programme.title: Sleeping Beauties
programme.desc: Masha is the best "mommy" in the world, but even she can not put Rosy to sleep. Bear offers a solution: a music box. And everything would have been fine, but the music box suddenly turns out to hold a surprise inside it!

programme.title: All You Need is a Goal
programme.desc: The ball is on the field, the players are in the field, the Bear in the chair is rooting for his favorite team. But Masha got bored in anticipation of a goal. Why wait when there is a team in the yard, and everyone needs a goal so much!

programme.title: What a wonderful game
programme.desc: Hockey is a game for the most courageous, strong and dexterous! All you need is a united experienced team and a talented coach, who can lead them to victory. But where can one find such a team? Watch the episode and find out!

programme.title: Fishy story
programme.desc: Summer is a time of rest and miracles. How nice is just to sit on the river bank with your best friends! However, everything is not so simple in our story. The Bear didn't even suspect what kind of adventure he was going to find on his fishing trip. While Masha and She-Bear frightened by his sudden disappearance, explore the neighborhood, he ... however, you will find out everything yourself in our new episode.

programme.title: Springtime For Bear
programme.desc: The Bear wakes up with the arrival of spring. While running around the forest, he stumbles upon a beautiful female bear. He quickly falls in love. He grabs some flowers and chocolates and rushes to her hoping to invite her for a date. Of course, Masha ruins all of his plans. The Bear does his best to get rid of the girl disturbs their idyll. Finally the female Bear notices her and demands an explanation. He tries to explain but faces with a choice –Masha or the female Bear. The Bear can't make up his mind at once and the Female Bear goes away with another bear.

programme.title: Hat Trick
programme.desc: The Bear is desperately struggling against the greedy moth, which appeared in his house. Trying to save his magic box, he puts it on the porch, and Masha finds the magic hat that can make her invisible ...

programme.title: Stripes And Whiskers
programme.desc: The Circus Tiger visits his old friend Bear. The whiskered and stripped cat is utterly bewildered by Masha's behavior and tries everything to get rid of her. Nevertheless his changes his mind when he gets lost in the forest and Masha saves in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Spanish Tunes
programme.desc: The bear is ready for anything to please Masha and She-Bear, even to become a mysterious and unpredictable Spaniard for a day. They travel to an amazing and hospitable country, where passions are seething to the sounds of the guitar and the clicking of a castanets.

programme.title: Pink of Fashion
programme.desc: You don't have to go to Paris to be fashionable. It's enough to ask for help from your best friend. France will share an amazing taste in clothes and a thirst for life with Masha.

programme.title: From England with Love
programme.desc: A new lovely friend from foggy England got lost in the forest. Masha acts like a real Robin Hood. She wants to help this lost soul to return home. Meanwhile, the eternally hungry Wolves are trying to get to our guest.

programme.title: Horrifying Story Of Grandmother And Grandson
programme.desc: It happens that grown-up people have their own fears! For example, one grandmother was very afraid not to please her grandson. Whatever she cooked- nothing was good enough for him. Once she tried to give him a tomato, but he just threw it towards the wall! Grandma was very upset and left the house. And so he was left alone and scared- there was no one home! Much fear he had suffered until his grandmother came back! This terrible trick taught him a worthy lesson so nevertheless he was cranky ever after and ate with a terrible appetite!

programme.title: A Ghost Bike Saga Which Makes You Shiver
programme.desc: You think no one could ever be afraid of a bike...Today, you will hear an incredible... and amazing heartbreaking story... about a bicycle! There was one boy called Gosha, who was very upset when he got bicycle for his birthday as he once imagined himself rushing down the street riding that huge two-wheeled scary monster! But in reality it's so simple to ride a bike without any worries...isn't it?

programme.title: Scary Story About Spooky Stories
programme.desc: Are you sure that you really like spooky stories? What if this kind of story will get you really thrilled? Listen to one classic story and don't say that you are not shocked after all!

programme.title: Super Scary Story Of A Little Boy Who Was Afraid Of Washing
programme.desc: One boy was so afraid of the water that he stopped washing himself and turned into a piggy! All his buddies ran away from him scared! But in the end he overcame his fear and began to wash his face and hands as he realized that the water can be safe and fun! The boy was very brave and even won a swimming competition!

programme.title: Horrible True Story Of How A Boy Was Transferred To Another School
programme.desc: He was terrified so much because he thought that another strange school is full of monster-looking teachers, gym classes where you have to fight without rules and classmates-bullies! But in reality there was nothing to be afraid of because all the schools are practically the same- with normal classmates and teachers who are always ready to make you feel comfortable!Today you will hear a story which you haven't heard before…about one boy who was transferred to another school!

programme.title: Creepy Tale About Useful Inventions
programme.desc: Here is another spooky story about useful inventions that might nonetheless ruin your life…just imagine…what if there is mega brain who wants to conquer the Earth with some mechanical monsters?! You might think it's a joke, but there are so many gadgets around you, can you guarantee that you are safe? Ok, ok, relax, Masha will find a way out! Oh, yeah!

programme.title: Soul Freezing Tale Of Grim Forest And Tiny Timid Bug
programme.desc: All children are afraid of the dark. Masha was afraid of it too and had to sit with a torch all night long! But once upon a time she came up with the tale about a tiny bug, which lived in the woods and was so afraid of the dark, that every rustle made its heart tremble! The bug suffered a lot until he realized that all tiny things you see in the dark just seem to be frightful and fear makes no sense at all!

programme.title: Gloomy Story About The Darkest Dreams
programme.desc: All children are keen on computer games! Everyone likes to shoot a couple of monsters before going to sleep. Tolik also liked to play shooters until the monsters attack him in reality in order to commit the revenge! Or…was it just a dream? Let's see...

programme.title: Coming Back Ain't Easy
programme.desc: The Bear hates to say goodbye to Masha and can't stand being apart. Meanwhile, other forest dwellers are chilling in the yard not knowing that this fragile paradise is on the verge of collapse as the Bear receives a long-awaited phone call from Masha…

programme.title: New Kids on the Block!
programme.desc: Masha enthusiastically plays with her "dolls", but Rosie wants to be independent. She trades places with wolves and now they are under Masha's care. Rosie enjoys adult life, but everything is not that simple ...

programme.title: The Very Fairy Tale
programme.desc: Masha loves fairy tales and of course she believes that each fairy tale should lead to happy end, even if nothing contributes to it! That's how the story goes… The Bear still hopes to win the heart of the female Bear. He finds an ancient gondola at the bottom of the forest lake. The Bear decides to restore it and invites the female Bear for a romantic ride! No one would have expected that this story would perfectly match Masha's new hobby - puppet theatre.

programme.title: When a Pig Flies
programme.desc: Rosie has lost her peace because of such appetizing and ripe acorns growing right above her little snout. To get the desired but inaccessible delicacy, she must jump above her head or simply learn how to fly. It's good there is Masha around, who knows for sure it is always useful to dream.

programme.title: Soup Pursuit
programme.desc: The wolves are going to cook borscht under Masha's guidance. They have a cookbook, a big pot and a ravenous appetite. But they still gotta get the ingredients! It seems that the newly-minted culinary specialists will get something interesting going on.

programme.title: Recipe For Disaster
programme.desc: The Bear plays checkers. Masha interrupts him asking to feed her. The Bear cooks some porridge for her. But Masha doesn't like it. The Bear goes off in a huff. Masha decides to cook porridge her-self. But soon the porridge swells out. All the for-est inhabitants will remember this day for long…

programme.title: Treasure Island
programme.desc: When you're with your best friends, adventure is right around the corner! This time Masha and her faithful companions go on an amazing journey for pirate treasures. What awaits the brave travelers on the road ahead?

programme.title: Sabre-Toothed Bear
programme.desc: Everyone is curious to know more details about their ancestors: what they were like, what did they do… Once upon a time the Bear took an interest in how his progenitor Bear could look like. In order to answer this question the Bear has to invent and build…guess what? - a real time machine! And, of course, Masha could not miss such a discovery!

programme.title: The Mystery Guest
programme.desc: Somebody terribly scary has climbed into the house of Penguin and made a terrible mess there! Bear rushes straight down to Antarctica to help the baby, and, of course, Masha tags along with him. Although if we are to face danger, then we must do so together!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: Call Me Please!
programme.desc: A funny interpretation of an old fable about a boy who called for help and shouted “Wolves!”. The Bear wants to watch a soccer game but first he needs to get rid of the girl. The Bear sends her foe a walk to the forest and gave her a cell phone in order to be safe. As a result Masha annoys him with her calls for any trivial reasons and when she finds herself in real danger, the Bear doesn't answer the phone …

programme.title: Once In A Year
programme.desc: The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.The Bear has his birthday party. All animals come to his place to congratulate him and give some presents. Seeing this Masha decides to prepare for her own birthday so none of the animals wouldn't have a chance to forget about her party and the list of presents.

programme.title: Princess or Dragon?
programme.desc: A snow tower? Check. A group of friends? Check. Sound like a recipe for a fun game! Even Bear caved to the pressure and joined Masha, Rosie and Penguin – what wouldn't you do for the sake of the children! But who will be the Princess? And who will be the Dragon? And the knight and his brave steed? Masha has her own opinion on these questions…

programme.title: We Come In Peace!
programme.desc: In the courtyard of the Bear's house a spaceship makes an emergency landing. The aliens need to urgently replenish their supplies and return home. Only on the ground everything is arranged differently than at home. Masha and Mishka will help them to understand what's what, fix the ship and go back to home.

programme.title: Berry Naughty
programme.desc: Oh, what a ripe, sweet, and beautifully-smelling raspberry! Masha has gone picking berries, but Bear had strictly forbidden it. Now she'll do anything to avoid admitting that she disobeyed him. The situation goes too far, and everyone in the forest gets involved in the debacle. So what will the strict Bear do?

programme.title: The Wolf and the Fox
programme.desc: Once upon a time there lived a fisherman with his wife. Nearby there lived the Fox. One day the man went to a frozen pond to fish. On his way he found the Fox, who pretended to be dead, and picked her up. The Man started to fish and fell asleep over an ice-hole. The Wolf saw this and was glad as he hoped to get some fish, but the Fox told the Wolf that it's her own fisherman and if he wants to eat some fish - he should put in his own tail in an ice-hole. The Wolf's tail froze in the ice and fishes made a cute Christmas tree out of it. The Man, his Wife, the Fox, the Cat and the Mouse finally pulled the Wolf's tail out of the hole and the New Year has finally come.

programme.title: The Wolf and the Seven Young Kids
programme.desc: This educative tale teaches us that caution should never be dismissed. Mother-Goat goes to pick up cabbage, leaving her seven kids alone at home. Hungry Wolf tries to get into the house imitating mother Goat's voice to fool the little yeanlings. He manages to deceive six kids, but the seventh, the smallest one, manages to hide in the oven. The Wolf tries to get into the house through the chimney, but here comes Mother-Goat and finds her seventh kid. She melts the stove, and the Wolf rushes into the forest with his tail burnt. The other six kids come back home and finally the family reunites.

programme.title: The Fox and the Rolling Pin
programme.desc: This is the story about the Fox, the Cat and the Rooster. The sneaky Fox wanted to fool the Cat in order to eat the Rooster and get a rolling-pin. No matter how the Fox tried to butter up the Cat, he denied hand over the Rooster to the Fox. To teach her a lesson, the Cat got into a bag himself and when the Fox opened it in order to eat the Rooster, the Cat jumped out of it and frightened her. The point of the story is that “if you are well off you don't seek better”.

programme.title: Go I Know Not Whither
programme.desc: Once upon a time there was a king. He was very cranky and foolish. One day he wished to taste an exotic fowl and sent Yegor the huntsman to the deep forest. In the forest, Yegor met a starling, which turned into a beautiful girl. The Tsar saw Yegor to have successfully completed his task and also got the beautiful wife. He started to envy Yegor. The Tsar decided to send Yegor over distant seas to bring do not know what. Despite Tsar's insidious plan, Yegor has successfully returned back home and even taught the king an important lesson not to envy other people.

programme.title: The Frog Princess
programme.desc: There lived a Tsar with his three sons. The oldest son married on nobleman's daughter, the second one married the merchant's daughter, while the youngest son - on the Frog. She was not pretty, but happened to be the Frog Princess who turned into a beautiful girl. This story teaches us to take care of your pets. This is the only way they could appeal to your concerns and become your faithful friends.

programme.title: Liar, Liar, Pants On Fire
programme.desc: Kids love daydreaming and show off their imaginary successes, aren't they?! Masha and Panda grip into a real cheating competition! This would be very funny story If only all the secrets were not revealed all at the most inopportune time!

programme.title: Laundry Day
programme.desc: The Bear decides to suit a big laundry in his yard, but yet he has no idea that soon he would have to pull Masha from a puddle and a jar of jam. But it's not all- now the Bear has to sew new dresses eve-ry time when Masha will get wet or dirty.

programme.title: Susan Jones: Lady Ha Ha
programme.desc: Susan Jones is a tenacious headlining comedian, writer, master of ceremonies, and motivational force with national touring experience.

programme.title: Tony Calabrese: Fugettaboutit!
programme.desc: Tony Calabrese is frustrated with a few things: the Pope isn't Italian, vacations involve movement, and the AARP is the retired mafia.

programme.title: Danny Johnson
programme.desc: Danny Johnson's hilarious, clean stand-up has entertained audiences in comedy clubs, corporate events, and churches nationwide. Often called a cross between Jerry Seinfeld and Kevin James Danny's show is relatable, engaging, and always hilarious. Danny has starred in numerous TV commercials, Comedy Central's Laugh Riots, Florida's Funniest Comedian semi-finalist, Winner-Carnival Cruise line Comedy Challenge, Finalist in Search for the One Christian Comedy contest, and has had the pleasure of sharing the stage with Chris Rock, Bob Saget, Billy Gardell, Richard Lewis, and a variety of others. Danny has led a dual track career for over a decade achieving success in both corporate America and as a comedian. Blending his unique skill sets led to him publishing his first book, "You Stink and They Know It! A practical guide to nailing your next job interview."

programme.title: Caleb Elliott: Diary of a Smooth Black Kid
programme.desc: One of DryBar's youngest comics, Caleb Elliot proves that age is anything but a setback.

programme.title: Bob Zany
programme.sub-title: I Think I Handled That Well
programme.desc: He simply reaches into a bottomless grab bag of jokes, so smooth and effortless that it would be easy to overlook just how much talent and skill is behind the process'"

programme.title: Andy Gold
programme.desc: Andy Gold has appeared in festivals and competitions all over the country, including the Boston Comedy Festival, San Diego Comedy Festival, Laugh Your Asheville Off and Comcast's Trial by Laughter Comedy Festival. Andy's comedy has also been featured on Hulu and Kevin Hart's Laugh out Loud network on Sirius XM.

programme.title: Jamie Lissow
programme.desc: Actor and comedian Jamie Lissow is best known for his role in the current Netflix Original Series Real Rob, alongside SNL alum Rob Schneider, a show Jamie co-wrote and co-produced. Jamie made his network television debut on The Tonight Show and has since appeared on The Late Late Show, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central's Premium Blend, Gotham Live, Star Search, and his own half-hour Comedy Central special. A headliner at comedy clubs across the country, he's also been featured at The Montreal Comedy Festival and The Great American Comedy Festival. Lissow has appeared on Fox News Redeye more than 50 times while still managing to have no political opinions.

programme.title: Helene Angley: Queen Size
programme.desc: Helene brings honesty to the stage that helps everyone relax-- and laugh at the joys and pains of aging, being a married mother of two and all that the generation gap brings!

programme.title: Greg Warren
programme.desc: Greg Warren is a nationally touring headliner and has been featured on Late Night with Seth Meyers, Last Comic Standing, Comedy Central Presents, The Late Late Show with Craig Ferguson, BET and CMT. Greg is a fan favorite on the nationally syndicated Bob and Tom Radio Show and can be heard daily on Sirius/XM.

programme.title: Kjell Bjorgen
programme.sub-title: I'm Sorry But I Won't Apologize
programme.desc: Kjell began his comedy career in Los Angeles, California. He gained some notoriety when featured in both the Chicago comedy festival and Montreal comedy festival. He decided to hone his craft and perform on the road. His hard work paid off when asked to be the opener on the Lewis Black Nothing's Sacred tour. You may have seen him on NBC's Late Friday and Comedy Central's Live at Gotham.

programme.title: Celebrity Name Game
programme.desc: Early on in game shows, when stars took part, they aided players -- to guess secret words on "Password," for instance. Now they're helping them guess names of VIPs in host Craig Ferguson's four-round competition set in a party atmosphere. The celebrity/contestant pairs must identify the famous -- actors, athletes, politicians, cartoon characters, etc. -- based on improvised clues for a chance to win $20,000. The celebrity connection extends behind the cameras actors Courteney Cox and David Arquette are among executive producers of a show based on board game "Identity Crisis."

programme.title: Let's Make a Deal
programme.desc: Costumed contestants compete for prizes.

programme.title: The Price Is Right
programme.sub-title: Come on down!" "The Price Is Right
programme.desc: - hosted by Bob Barker until 2007 and Drew Carey thereafter -- features a wide variety of games and contests with the same basic challenge: Guess the prices of everyday (or not-quite-everyday) retail items. Four contestants, all of whom are seated in one of the wildest audiences in daytime game-show history, are called to the stage to play a preliminary pricing round. That winner joins the host on stage for one of more than 70 different pricing games. After three such games, the contestants spin a big wheel -- hoping to get as close to $1 as possible -- in the "Showcase Showdown." The two highest winners of that round advance to the final, where prizes could be cars or roomsful of furniture. A trio of models presents the prizes.

programme.desc: On this episode of the BiggerPockets Money Podcast, Mindy Jensen and Scott Trench are joined by Emily Egashira to hear about her financial journey. Emily's journey to financial independence proves that your starting point doesn't determine your financial future. Growing up in poverty with a scarcity mindset, she transformed her life and is set to reach financial independence by 40 through disciplined saving, strategic investing, and powerful mindset shifts.

programme.title: Creature From the Black Lagoon
programme.desc: Remnants of a mysterious animal have come to light in a remote jungle, and a group of scientists intends to determine if the find is an anomaly or evidence of an undiscovered beast. To accomplish their goal, the scientists (Antonio Moreno, Richard Carlson, Richard Denning, Whit Bissell) must brave the most perilous pieces of land South America has to offer. But the terrain is nothing compared to the danger posed by an otherworldly being that endangers their work and their lives.

programme.title: The Creature Walks Among Us
programme.desc: Scientists (Jeff Morrow, Rex Reason) capture the creature from the black lagoon and turn him into an air breather.

programme.title: Curse of the Undead
programme.desc: A cow-town preacher (Eric Fleming) shoots a custom bullet at a vampire gunfighter (Michael Pate) in the Old West.

programme.title: The Curse of the Werewolf
programme.desc: A man with brutal and macabre origins, Leon Corledo (Oliver Reed) was raised in the home of Don Alfredo Corledo (Clifford Evans), his kind and loving adopted father. When he leaves Don Alfredo to find work, Leon discovers that he has increasingly violent urges. Although these tendencies are calmed by Leon's love for the beautiful Christina (Catherine Feller), he ultimately cannot contain his curse and transforms into a werewolf, terrorizing the Spanish countryside.

programme.desc: A doctor (Beverly Garland) and an adventurer (John Bromfield) head for the Amazon, where a guy (Tom Payne) in a bird suit is scaring natives.

programme.title: Chen Xue-Hong, Zhang Cheng, Chen Yunjie & Chen Sa
programme.sub-title: Piano works by Chopin, Scriabin, Schumann & Liszt
programme.desc: In recent years, a new generation of Chinese pianists has emerged on the international scene. But there are many more young Chinese artists, who the Académie France-Chine aims to enable to deepen their art by introducing them to and giving them a platform within French and European culture. Four of these artists are Chen Xue-Hong, Zhang Cheng, Chen Yunjie and Chen Sa, who made their joint debut in Paris in this unique concert at the Théâtre des Champs-Élysées that showcased their extraordinary talent. On the program are Chopin's Piano Sonata No. 2, Schumann's Piano Sonata No. 1, Scriabin's Piano Sonata No. 8 and Paysage (No. 3) and Mazeppa (No. 4) from Liszt's Études d'Exécution Transcendante. The concert closes with Messiaen's Regard de l'Esprit de la joie (No. 10) from Vingt regards sur l'Enfant-Jésus.

programme.title: Ballet of the Mariinsky Theatre
programme.desc: The Mariinsky Ballet performs 'Anna Karenina', a sweeping two-act ballet choreographed by Alexei Ratmansky. The ballet is based on Lev Tolstoy's 1877 novel that tells the tragic story of the married socialite Anna Karenina and her affair with cavalry officer Count Vronsky. The ballet opens where the novel ends: tormented by despair and loneliness, Anna throws herself under a train, whereupon Count Vronsky discovers his lover's lifeless body. Ratmansky's choreography is set to Rodion Shchedrin's music, which is performed by the Mariinsky Orchestra under the baton of Valery Gergiev. Among the dancers are Ulyana Lopatkina, Victor Baranov, Andrei Yermakov, and Svetlana Ivanova. This performance was recorded at the Mariinsky Theatre in St. Petersburg, Russia, in March 2014.

programme.title: Gewandhausorchester Leipzig, Andris Nelsons & Kristine Opolais
programme.desc: Andris Nelsons, together with his then-wife, the great soprano Kristine Opolais and the Gewandhausorchester Leipzig present a program dedicated to Antonin Dvořák, singing the melodies that the composer hid in all layers of his music with tender, warm, soft colors. Nelsons' tempos remain calm and relaxed, allowing the omnipresent beauty of Dvořák's music to unfold and flood the Gewandhaus. The program opens with Othello, a Concert Overture for Orchestra, Op. 93. Opolais performs “Song to the Moon” from Rusalka, “Songs my Mother Taught Me” from Gypsy Songs, Op. 55/4. This is followed by the Polonaise and 'O, marno, marno to je' from Rusalka and 'Dobrá! Já mu je dám!... Jak je mi?' from Smetana's opera Dalibor. The concert closes with a performance of Dvořák's Symphony no. 9 in E Minor, Op. 95 (“From the New World”). Recorded at the Gewandhaus, Leipzig in May 2017.
